case_title: RICHARD G. BROWN VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, RICHARD G. AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, RICHARD G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. $4,107.25 PRINCIPAL, $3,737.60 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,874.85
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, RICHARD G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. $4,022.25 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,107.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, RICHARD G. AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-03-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3,737.60 ACCRUED INTEREST, $30.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,377.25 FILED BY BROWN, RICHARD G. AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, RICHARD G.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY BROWN, RICHARD G. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, RICHARD G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. $3,022.25 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,107.25, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT IMPOSED ADDITIONAL CONDITIONS NOT IN ORIGIANL LOAN COMMITMENT CAUSING DELAYS IN CLOSING AND ADDITIONAL EXPENSES TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
